MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Plaintiff'S Request For Admissions Of The Genuineness Of Documents Set One Admitted.
Appearances: Robin D Hart (510.273.2435) for plaintiff and moving party; Maria Alfaro (637.0532) defendant and responding party appearing in propria persona.
Defendant provided the court with a copy of her opposition. The matter was argued and the court modified its ruling as follows: denied. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
